title: Balloons Purple, Pack of 100 Purple Balloons, 10 Inch Latex Balloons Birthday, Balloon Purple, Balloons Birthday Party Decoration Birthday Wedding Baby Shower Festival Anniversary Decoration
features: Purple balloons: you will receive 100 x 10 inch latex purple balloons, balloon set is everything you need to make your party an unforgettable experience.

Premium latex balloons: the purple balloons are made of natural latex, which is durable and safe, strong and thick, beautiful and not easy to break. Balloons stay intact throughout your event and give your decoration a colourful accent.

Easy to inflate: the purple latex balloons can be easily inflated with a pump or an inflator and can be filled with air or helium. Do not fill the balloons too full, but only 85-90%, avoid sharp objects and keep the balloons away from high temperatures. You can inflate the balloons to different sizes to create imaginative decorations while enjoying valuable time with your loved ones.

Ideal party decoration: purple balloons party decoration for birthday decoration, graduations, baby showers, weddings, bachelor parties, anniversaries and more. Let them add colour and fun to any special moment!

Safety note: This product is mainly used for decorating houses or events and is purchased and furnished by adults, not as a play object for children. If you have any questions about use, please contact us.
